since_last: 46% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +1.00%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 46% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.13% · BTC +2.11% · Gold -0.57% · Nasdaq100 -0.07%. 46% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +1.00%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.00%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: META is the standout at +6.15%
cards.body: Leaders: META +6.15%, HPE +3.37%, BABA +2.84%, PATH +2.03%, TTD +1.96%. Laggards: RXRX -5.12%, INTC -3.43%, TER -3.42%, POWL -2.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.59% at $148.22
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.59% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
